name: Shrimp & Scallop Kabobs from Fred Goslin
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Chopped Crystalized Ginger OR 1 t Onion Powder
1 lb Sea Scallops, Cut in Half
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp.
2. Drain the pineapple chunks.
3. Use imported soy sauce if available for better taste; otherwise, use domestic soy sauce.
4. In a medium bowl, combine oil, lemon juice, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and onion powder (if using). Mix well.
5. Add shrimp and scallops to the marinade; cover. Refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
6. Place shrimp, scallops, pineapple, and zucchini on bamboo skewers that have soaked in water for 1 hour, or on metal skewers.
7. Grill or broil the kabobs for 3 to 6 minutes per side, basting frequently with marinade, until the shrimp are pink.
8. Refrigerate leftovers.
